methods.description: Process for measuring elephant fossils to compare sizes across different taxa and locations.

steps.description: All measurements were taken with calipers and/or an osteometric board, and measured as the maximum medio-lateral (m-l) breadth and maximum proximo-distal (pr-d) length.
steps.searchable_summary: measure elephant fossils using calipers and osteometric board
outputs: measurements of m-l breadth and pr-d length

steps.description: Measurements from the literature were included for Contrada Fusco and San Teodoro Cave.
steps.searchable_summary: include literature measurements for specific sites

steps.description: Data were also obtained in 2008-2009 by Maria Rita Palombo and others, and are here included.
steps.searchable_summary: include previously obtained data from collaborators

steps.description: Any uncertainties regarding how measurements were obtained were queried directly with Maria Rita Palombo, and in some cases a sub-sample of measurements was compared in order to verify consistency between observers.
